title: Red Eye Barry
description: Red Eye Barry is a thrilling horror mod that enhances the Minecraft horror experience with levels unforetold. He is also gay. Dweller
body:
![Banner](https://i.imgur.com/DHU8qNi.png)

## Red Eye Barry
Red Eye Barry is a thrilling horror experience mod that brings levels of horror unseen before in Minecraft. This mod is intended to not be played alone due to extreme horror.

Red Eye Barry is an entity that will randomly spawn around your world, the rest is up to you to find.

This mod requires geckolib to work
